title: The Central Government hereby establishes a Wakf Board for the Union Territory of Chandigarh and appoints the following persons as its members, with effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette

BR'ittR' ~ @1q -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY MJNISTRY OF MINORITY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th April, 2010 [PART 11-SEc. 3(ii)] S.O. 819(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (7) of Section 14 of the Wakf Act, 1995 (43 of 1995), the Central Government hereby establishes a Wakf Board for the Union Territory of Chandigarh and appoints.the following persons as its members, with effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. SI. No. Name I. Shri Mansur Ali, House No. 3060, Sector-20-D, Chandigarh 2 Shri Mohd. Sadiq Sheikh, House No. 1035, Sector-29-B, Chandigarh 3. Shri Shakeel Ahmed Quasmi, House No. 1039, Mori Gate, Manimajra, Chandigarh 4. Shri Mohd. Firoz Khan, House No. 3315-A, Sector-24-D, Chandigarh Category Section 14(1 )(b)(iii) of the Wakf Act, 1995 Section 14(I)(c)oftheWakfAct, 1995 I Section 14(l)(d)ofthe Wakf Act, 1995 Section 14(l)(e) of the Wakf Act I 995 [F.
